Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}Oh, right! I better explain how my Orgia Mode works to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}As you may know, Sister, I can also activate Orgia Mode.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}This ability allows me to temporarily disable my limiters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}As a result, my offensive capabilities will increase significantly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}However, in exchange, I won't be able to receive direct commands.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}And after using Orgia Mode, I'll eventually overheat and briefly become immobile.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}It'll take some time before my systems cool down and become operational again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}So it's best to use it at the most opportune moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}...That's about it. Should I go over it again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}You can give me the command to activate Orgia Mode once my Theurgy's ready![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Metis's Neo Orgia Mode is different from Aigis's Orgia Mode.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Metis's version lasts longer than Aigis's. During this duration, there will be no SP or HP consumption to use skills.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Once her Orgia Mode ends, Metis will overheat and be rendered immobile among other significant drawbacks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Use it when the time is right for maximum effectiveness.[n]{f 1 1}
